name: Spaghetti with Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet and drain off excess fat.
2. Transfer the meat to a slow cooker.
3. In the blender container, combine one can of tomatoes (undrained), onion, carrot, and garlic. Blend until chopped and stir into the meat in the slow cooker.
4. Cut up the remaining can of tomatoes but do not drain; stir into the meat mixture with tomato paste, parsley, bay leaves, sugar, crushed basil, salt, dried oregano, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 8-10 hours.
6. To serve, turn to high-heat setting. Remove bay leaves and cover; heat until bubbly, about 10 minutes.
7. Slowly blend cold water into corn starch and stir into the tomato mixture. Cover and cook an additional 10 minutes longer.
8. Spoon over hot cooked spaghetti. Pass grated Parmesan cheese to sprinkle atop.
